releases.author: jialingxiao
releases.description:
## Bug fixes in v1.0.7

### P2 — Concept connections now finds custom-named notes
"添加关联链接到笔记" now uses the actual saved filename (stored in `savedStem`) instead of reconstructing the default path. If you renamed the file at save time, the link button will still find it correctly.

### P3 — Quiz "保存并结束" now goes through filename preview
The Step 5 save button now calls `showSavePreview()` instead of saving directly. If you already confirmed a filename in Step 4, it pre-fills that same name so you just confirm. If you skipped Step 4, you get the normal filename input.

### Root fix
`saveNote()` writes `this.state.savedStem` immediately after writing the file, so all subsequent operations always have the correct path regardless of which entry point triggered the save.

## What's Changed
* Fix savedStem: concept connections and quiz save use confirmed filename by @jialingxiao in https://github.com/jialingxiao/obsidian-feynman-learning/pull/6


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jialingxiao/obsidian-feynman-learning/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7
releases.name: v1.0.7 — Fix custom filename in concept connections and quiz save

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new in v1.0.6

### Filename preview before save
"💾 保存到 vault" now shows an inline editable field with the proposed filename (default: `YYYY-MM-DD 概念名`). Edit freely, then confirm. The saved file and index link both use your custom name.

### Learning queue (from text extraction)
- Each extracted concept chip has a "＋" button to add it to the queue
- "全部加入队列" adds all at once
- A **Queue card** appears on the dashboard when the queue is non-empty — "开始学习 →" starts learning and removes it; "✕" discards silently
- Queue persists across Obsidian restarts

### GitHub Action (auto-release on tag push)
`.github/workflows/release.yml` — push a semver tag and GitHub will automatically build and publish a release with all required files attached.

### README
Updated feature list, added a screenshots placeholder, and rewrote the review interval section as a tier table.
releases.name: v1.0.6 — Filename preview, learning queue, GitHub Action

releases.author: jialingxiao
releases.description:
## What's new in v1.0.5

### Review quality tiers
Three quality levels now control the next review interval:
- **All ✓ (很熟练)** → interval × 1.3 (longer gap)
- **Any △ (partial pass)** → interval × 0.6 (shortened)
- **Fail** → retry in 1 day

### Weak-point targeted drill
After a failed or partial review a new button appears:
- **Failed** → "🎯 专项练习"  |  **Partial pass** → "🎯 强化弱点"

Click to get 2–3 AI-generated questions targeting the exact weak dimensions, with per-question feedback and a "再练一次" retry option.
releases.name: v1.0.5 — Expert-pass (×1.3) and weak-point drill

releases.author: jialingxiao
releases.description:
## What's new in v1.0.4

### API Test Button
- Settings page now has a **"测试连接"** button
- Sends a minimal request with your current API Key, Base URL, and Model
- Shows a clear success notice `✓ 连接成功（模型：…）` or a specific error message on failure

### Friendly Error Messages
- All AI calls now map HTTP error codes to actionable Chinese messages:
  - 401 → "API Key 无效或已过期"
  - 403 → "无权限访问该模型"
  - 404 → "接口地址或模型不存在"
  - 429 → "请求过于频繁或余额不足"
  - 5xx → "AI 服务暂时不可用"

### Version Sync Script
- New `scripts/version-bump.mjs` — run `npm run bump <version>` to sync `package.json`, `manifest.json`, and `versions.json` atomically
- `versions.json` now included with full release history

## Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/feynman-learning/` folder.
releases.name: v1.0.4 — API test button, friendly errors, version-bump script

releases.author: jialingxiao
releases.description:
## What's new

### Custom API / model settings
- Configure any OpenAI-compatible endpoint: DeepSeek, GPT-4o, Claude, Ollama, and more
- New settings: API Base URL, Model name, Temperature slider

### Text extraction
- Paste an article or notes and click **📄 从原文提取概念**
- AI extracts 3–8 core concepts with rationale and suggested learning order
- Click any concept chip to fill the start form

### Weak-point review + dynamic intervals
- Review session surfaces failed dimensions (✗) from the previous attempt
- Partial pass (any △) shortens the next interval by 40%
- Button label and Notice now show the actual adjusted interval

### Bug fixes
- Partial-pass Notice and button label now display the real interval (with 0.6x applied) instead of the raw value
- Notion database ID description updated to reflect empty default
- previousWeakDims declaration order fixed (type-check now passes cleanly)

releases.author: jialingxiao
releases.description:
## What's changed

### Core learning loop improvements
- Review session now shows gaps from the previous note so you know what to focus on
- AI judgment replaced with three-dimension scoring: 语言简洁 / 核心机制 / 举例说明 (✓ △ ✗)
- Step 3 now verifies your final explanation covers every gap before advancing
- Step 1→2: AI-identified gaps auto-populate the step 2 textarea
- Step 2: collapsible reference panel shows your original step-1 explanation
- Failed reviews save dimension scores back to the note under '## 复习记录'

### New features
- Weekly report (📊 生成本周报告 in dashboard)
- Concept connections (🔗 概念关联 in step 4 summary)

### Bug fixes
- Removed personal Notion database ID from default settings
- Concept names with special characters (/\:*?"<>|) are now sanitised before use as filenames
- YAML frontmatter values are now escaped to handle colons, quotes, brackets
- Added tslib to devDependencies (tsc --noEmit now passes on clean install)

releases.author: jialingxiao
releases.description:
- Add weekly report: generate a Markdown summary of each week's learning activity with AI reflection
- Add concept connections: AI finds related concepts from your existing library and optionally adds wiki-links to notes
